provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, front-facing photograph of exactly eighteen identical clear glass bottles arranged in three rows of six on a plain white shelf, studio lighting, each bottle fully visible and distinct from its neighbors, no reflections creating confusion, sharp focus end to end
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
